title: Front-End Developer
duties: Provided remote consulting services to Walmart Global Tech.

Architected and delivered enterprise-scale internal applications using React, React Native, and TypeScript, supporting 100K+ global associates across 8 international markets and contributing to multi-million dollar operational cost savings.
Designed and implemented reusable component architecture using React, reduced feature development time by 30% and improved UI consistency across applications.
Led the modernization of legacy frontend systems into a scalable React architecture, improved page load performance by 35% and significantly enhanced maintainability.

Optimized rendering performance through efficient state management, memoization, and component-level optimizations, reduced unnecessary re-renders by 40%, improved application responsiveness and user experience
Enhanced CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins by integrating automated unit and integration tests with Jest, increased test coverage and reduced regression defects in production.
Led cross-functional collaboration with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to deliver intuitive enterprise workflow, improved usability and adoption across global teams

title: Remote Software Engineer
duties: Developed full-stack applications using React, Redux, and Java Spring Boot delivering scalable web solutions
Designed and enhanced dashboard UI/UX for GSTV platform, improved usability and user engagement.
Implemented RESTful APIs and backend services for AgendaOrganizer using MeteorJS and Node.js.
Collaborated in Agile development cycles, delivering iterative product improvements with strong focus on maintainability and code quality.
